sentences.target: Der Sportler trinkt nach dem Lauf Wasser.
sentences.reading: /deːɐ̯ ˈʃpɔʁtlɐ tʁɪŋkt naːx deːm laʊf ˈvasɐ./

translations.de: Der Sportler trinkt nach dem Lauf Wasser.
translations.ipa: /deːɐ̯ ˈʃpɔʁtlɐ tʁɪŋkt naːx deːm laʊf ˈvasɐ./
translations.en: The athlete drinks water after the run.
translations.es: El deportista bebe agua después de la carrera.
translations.fr: L'athlète boit de l'eau après la course.
translations.it: L'atleta beve acqua dopo la corsa.
translations.zh-Hans: 这名运动员跑完后喝水。
translations.yue: 個運動員跑完之後飲水。
translations.pt: O atleta bebe água após a corrida.
translations.vi: Vận động viên uống nước sau khi chạy xong.
translations.nl: De atleet drinkt water na het hardlopen.
translations.hu: A sportoló vizet iszik futás után.
translations.hi: दौड़ के बाद खिलाड़ी पानी पीता है.
translations.el: Ο αθλητής πίνει νερό μετά το τρέξιμο.
translations.ja: 選手は走った後に水を飲む。

tokens.explanation: Definite article in nominative masculine singular; determiner of the subject noun 'Sportler'.
Common noun, masculine; head of the subject NP; nominative singular.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; governs a direct object ('Wasser') and a temporal PP ('nach dem Lauf').
Preposition meaning 'after'; selects dative case; introduces temporal PP.
Definite article, dative masculine singular; determiner of 'Lauf' as object of the preposition 'nach'.
Common noun, masculine; dative singular as complement of 'nach'; denotes the event serving as temporal anchor.
Common mass noun, neuter; accusative singular as direct object of 'trinkt'; zero article.

sentences.target: Ich kenne den Sportler aus unserer Stadt.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈkɛnə deːn ˈʃpɔʁtlɐ aʊs ˈʊnzəʁɐ ʃtat./

translations.de: Ich kenne den Sportler aus unserer Stadt.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈkɛnə deːn ˈʃpɔʁtlɐ aʊs ˈʊnzəʁɐ ʃtat./
translations.en: I know the athlete from our town.
translations.es: Conozco al deportista de nuestra ciudad.
translations.fr: Je connais l'athlète de notre ville.
translations.zh-Hans: 我认识我们镇上的那位运动员。
translations.yue: 我識我哋鎮上嗰位運動員。
translations.ru: Я знаком со спортсменом из нашего города.
translations.pt: Eu conheço o atleta da nossa cidade.
translations.he: אני מכיר את הספורטאי מהעיר שלנו.
translations.vi: Tôi biết vận động viên ở thị trấn của chúng tôi.
translations.nl: Ik ken de atleet uit onze stad.
translations.uk: Я знаю спортсмена з нашого міста.
translations.hi: मैं हमारे शहर के खिलाड़ी को जानता हूँ.
translations.el: Γνωρίζω τον αθλητή από την πόλη μας.
translations.nb: Jeg kjenner utøveren fra byen vår.
translations.id: Saya kenal atlet dari kota kami.
translations.sv: Jag känner idrottaren från vår stad.
translations.ro: Îl cunosc pe sportivul din orașul nostru.
translations.da: Jeg kender atleten fra vores by.
translations.ja: 私は私たちの町の選手を知っている。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject of 'kenne'.

Possessive determiner, dative feminine singular; modifies 'Stadt' inside the PP headed by 'aus'.
Common noun, feminine; dative singular as complement of 'aus'; denotes origin.

sentences.target: Der Sportler trainiert jeden Morgen im Park.
sentences.reading: /deːɐ̯ ˈʃpɔʁtlɐ tʁaˈniːʁt ˈjeːdən ˈmɔʁgən ɪm paʁk./

translations.de: Der Sportler trainiert jeden Morgen im Park.
translations.ipa: /deːɐ̯ ˈʃpɔʁtlɐ tʁaˈniːʁt ˈjeːdən ˈmɔʁgən ɪm paʁk./
translations.en: The athlete trains every morning in the park.
translations.es: El deportista se entrena todas las mañanas en el parque.
translations.fr: L'athlète s'entraîne tous les matins au parc.
translations.it: L'atleta si allena ogni mattina al parco.
translations.zh-Hans: 这名运动员每天早上在公园训练。
translations.yue: 嗰位運動員每日朝早喺公園訓練。
translations.ru: Спортсмен тренируется каждое утро в парке.
translations.pt: O atleta treina todas as manhãs no parque.
translations.tr: Sporcu her sabah parkta antrenman yapıyor.
translations.vi: Vận động viên tập luyện mỗi sáng ở công viên.
translations.ar: الرياضي يتدرّب كل صباح في الحديقة.
translations.nl: De atleet traint elke ochtend in het park.
translations.hu: A sportoló minden reggel a parkban edz.
translations.hi: खिलाड़ी हर सुबह पार्क में अभ्यास करता है.
translations.pl: Zawodnik trenuje każdego ranka w parku.
translations.el: Ο αθλητής προπονείται κάθε πρωί στο πάρκο.
translations.nb: Utøveren trener hver morgen i parken.
translations.id: Atlet berlatih setiap pagi di taman.
translations.sv: Idrottaren tränar varje morgon i parken.
translations.ro: Sportivul se antrenează în fiecare dimineață în parc.
translations.cs: Sportovec trénuje každé ráno v parku.
translations.da: Atleten træner hver morgen i parken.
translations.ja: 選手は毎朝公園で練習する。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative masculine singular; determiner of the subject 'Sportler'.
Common noun, masculine; nominative singular; subject of 'trainiert'.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; predicate of the clause.
Quantifying determiner, accusative masculine singular; modifies 'Morgen' in a habitual temporal expression.
Common noun, masculine; forms the temporal adverbial 'jeden Morgen'. Morphologically accusative in the fixed time expression.
Contraction of 'in dem'; preposition 'in' selecting dative; heads a locative PP.
Common noun, masculine; dative singular as complement of 'im'; indicates training location.

sentences.target: Unsere Nachbarin filmt den Sportler mit dem Handy.
sentences.reading: /ˈʊnzəʁə ˈnaχbaʁɪn fɪlmt deːn ˈʃpɔʁtlɐ mɪt deːm ˈhɛndi./

translations.de: Unsere Nachbarin filmt den Sportler mit dem Handy.
translations.ipa: /ˈʊnzəʁə ˈnaχbaʁɪn fɪlmt deːn ˈʃpɔʁtlɐ mɪt deːm ˈhɛndi./
translations.en: Our neighbor is filming the athlete with her phone.
translations.es: Nuestra vecina está grabando al deportista con su teléfono.
translations.fr: Notre voisine filme l'athlète avec son téléphone.
translations.it: La nostra vicina sta riprendendo l'atleta con il suo telefono.
translations.ko: 우리 이웃이 휴대폰으로 선수를 촬영하고 있다.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们的女邻居用手机拍摄那名运动员。
translations.yue: 我哋個女鄰居用手機拍緊嗰位運動員。
translations.ru: Наша соседка снимает спортсмена на телефон.
translations.pt: Nossa vizinha está filmando o atleta com o celular.
translations.he: השכנה שלנו מצלמת את הספורטאי בטלפון שלה.
translations.vi: Chị hàng xóm của chúng tôi đang quay vận động viên bằng điện thoại của mình.
translations.nl: Onze buurvrouw filmt de atleet met haar telefoon.
translations.uk: Наша сусідка знімає спортсмена на свій телефон.
translations.hu: A szomszédasszonyunk a telefonjával felveszi a sportolót.
translations.hi: हमारी पड़ोसन अपने फोन से खिलाड़ी का वीडियो बना रही है.
translations.el: Η γειτόνισσά μας τραβάει βίντεο τον αθλητή με το κινητό της.
translations.nb: Naboen vår filmer utøveren med mobilen sin.
translations.id: Tetangga kami merekam atlet itu dengan ponselnya.
translations.sv: Vår granne filmar idrottaren med sin telefon.
translations.ro: Vecina noastră îl filmează pe sportiv cu telefonul ei.
translations.cs: Naše sousedka natáčí sportovce na telefon.
translations.da: Vores nabo filmer atleten med sin telefon.
translations.ja: 私たちの近所の女性がスマホで選手を撮影している。
